name: I'm on a dock
hints: You're on a dock with the sea nearby and a boat. NORTH leads to the beach.
GO SEA takes you into the water, but you'll be carried by currents. Make sure you have diving gear first.
GO SEA moves you to the sea (room 11) but auto-drops items and sets a swimming flag. NORTH goes to the beach by the hill (room 5).
Use NORTH to reach the beach. Only GO SEA if you have the face mask and are prepared to dive. Items get dropped when entering the sea.
notes: Dock area connecting the ship to the island. NORTH goes to beach (room 5). GO SEA enters the water (room 11) but auto-drops items. The boat is here but you need to interact with it from the ship.
